description: After canary acceptance, remove seed_candidates as a production execution path, direct LiveView service orchestration, obsolete Exa Mix-task paths used for production, raw agent-browser CLI coupling, and stale metadata contracts. Preserve explicitly named developer diagnostics where useful. Acceptance: one supported Ash/Oban path remains for scheduled and manual production runs, dead configuration is migrated, and regression tests reject legacy entry points.
title: Retire legacy seed and direct execution paths
